privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic KStars/INDI astronomical observation sequence. Verified that the agent must slew the telescope to 29P/Schwassmann-Wachmann 1 at RA 6.2561h and Dec 23.0717° (tolerance 30 arcmin) based on the alert document injected by setup_task.sh. The agent must capture at least 5 R-band and 3 V-band FITS images with timestamps strictly after the task start (stale 2024 files are ignored) and save them to /home/ga/Images/comets/29P/R/ and .../V/. The agent must also capture a finding chart and write an ICQ-format observation report to /home/ga/Documents/icq_report_29P.txt containing the comet designation (29P), an estimated magnitude (e.g. 12.5), coma/DC values, and observer/telescope headers.
